stemHtml: Which statements below that applies best to an ADIRU?

options.a: ADIRU is an Air Data Computer which is integrated with an Inertial Reference Unit
options.b: ADIRU is an Air Data Computer which is integrated with an Inertial Unit and GPS
options.c: ADIRU is an Attitude Director Indicator which is integrated with an Inertial Reference Unit
options.d: ADIRU is an Air Data Computer which is integrated with an Inertial Navigation System
